title: Antimima buchubergensis
taxonomy: Antimima buchubergensis is a species of plant in the family Mesembryanthemaceae. It belongs to the genus Antimima, which is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. The plant's classification is further supported by its inclusion in the family Mesembryanthemaceae, which is a family of succulent plants commonly known as ice plants. The species is also classified as being part of the order Caryophyllales, which is a larger group of flowering plants. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
